paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's governance and financing, such as the resignation of director designee Miles Everson and the completion of a $375 million convertible senior notes offering. There are also comments from cofounder Toby Neugebauer and analysis of the stock's value and retail traders' sentiment.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was a Schedule 13D/A filing and a DFAN14A filing related to the withdrawal of a solicitation to call a special meeting of shareholders. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
